title: Tune Retraction Settings
description: Print a single Benchy while adjusting retraction to reduce stringing.

dialogue.text: Retraction distance controls how far the filament pulls back between moves. Let's print another Benchy to dial it in.
Slice the model with a 1 mm retraction setting and start the job. Compare the surface finish to your last print.
Great! Keep experimenting with small adjustments until stringing disappears.
